div.p: This case-sensitive code system http://314e.com/fhir/CodeSystem/observation-tag defines the following codes:

tr.td: Top-level resource with no parents of its own

div.p: Indicates that, within the hierarchy of resources created through parent-child relationships, this resource occupies the top level and itself has no parent resource.
Indicates that neither this resource nor any recursive descendant resource bears a result or report.

description.value: Codes used to qualify DiagnosticReport and Observation resources within hierarchical parent-child result/report structures.

display.value: Top-level resource with no parents of its own

definition.value: Indicates that, within the hierarchy of resources created through parent-child relationships, this resource occupies the top level and itself has no parent resource.
Indicates that neither this resource nor any recursive descendant resource bears a result or report.
